
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:ж‰¶йўЁ]]


'''Fufeng''' (ж‰¶йўЁ)

* {{ill|Fufeng (region)|en|Fufeng (region)|qid=Q10916260|lt=Youfufeng|1=Fufeng (region)}} - An administrative division under the {{ill|Han dynasty|ja|жјўжњќ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Han dynasty|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to жјў|1=Han dynasty|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7209}}.
* {{ill|Fufeng Commandery|ja|ж‰¶йўЁйѓЎ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fufeng Commandery|1=Fufeng Commandery|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11497308}} - A historical commandery in China.
* {{ill|Fufeng County|en|Fufeng County|qid=Q1339481|lt=Fufeng County|1=Fufeng County}} - A county in {{ill|Baoji|en|Baoji|qid=Q514796|lt=Baoji|1=Baoji}}, {{ill|Shaanxi|en|Shaanxi|qid=Q47974|lt=Shaanxi Province|1=Shaanxi}}, {{ill|China|en|China|qid=Q148|lt=People's Republic of China|1=China}}.
{{translated page|ja|ж‰¶йўЁ|version=66777456|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[ja:ж‰¶йўЁ]]

[[en:Fufeng]]

<!--Fufeng--><!--Fufeng-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
{{disambiguation}}
{{wikidata link|Q23997315}}
[[Category:Place name disambiguation pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:Wikidata no English label]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
